arts.sum: The German is on the verge of his second final of this season, but to achieve it, he will have to win the second leg of the Copa del Rey semifinal against Atlético de Madrid at the Metropolitano. The Barça coach assessed the duo's physical condition ahead of the Copa del Rey semi-final second leg against Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Rakitic reveals what Xavi first told him about Yamal
arts.sum: “I remember that when I spoke to Xavi about him for the first time, he said to me: ‘Ivan he is so intelligent that he knows when to stop an attack, when he has to come back, when he has to go around again...’ and that’s not easy. The former Barcelona midfielder also revealed what Xavi once told him about Yamal when the forward was still coming through the ranks at the club.

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona will book their place in the Copa del Rey final with another victory in the Spanish capital on Wednesday night. Madrid has been a happy hunting ground for the La Liga leaders this season, with Hansi Flick's side claiming memorable victories in the capital's two grand amphitheatres.
